cookware is all the motivation I needed. \\ud83d\\udc95\\u2728\\n\\n#pinkkitchen #kitchenaesthetics #girlylifestyle #homeaesthetic #foryou \\n\\npink kitchen, cute cookware, aesthetic kitchen, girly all my favorite jewelry \\ud83e\\udd0d\\u2728\\n\\nI genuinely love how spacious and practical it is. \\nEverything has its own place now,no more tangled necklaces or missing earrings! \\ud83d\\udc8d\\n\\nIf you\\u2019ve been looking for a stylish way to organize your jewelry (or the perfect personalized gift), definitely check it out!\\n\\u0040calliegifts \\n\\n\\u2728 Use my code LOVER166 to get 15\\u0025 OFF.\\n\\n#jewellerybox #vanityorganization #jewellerystorage #foryou #trending \\n\\njewelry organization, personalized jewelry box, custom jewelry box, jewelry storage, vanity organization, organize with me, jewelry organizer, jewelry collection, pink jewelry box, personalized gift, gift for her, vanity essentials, jewelry accessories, aesthetic organization, jewelry lover\"}}]},\"edge_media_to_comment\":{\"count\":99},\"edge_liked_by\":{\"count\":244},\"commenter_count\":48,\"taken_at_timestamp\":1784119283,\"owner\":{\"id\":\"42502779607\",\"profile_pic_url\":\"https:\\\/\\\/scontent.cdninstagram.com\\\/v\\\/t51.82787-19\\\/645733534_18057637466419608_2434220839383956026_n.jpg?stp=dst-jpg_s100x100_tt6&_nc_cat=107&ccb=7-5&_nc_sid=bf7eb4&efg=eyJ2ZW5jb2RlX3RhZyI6InByb2ZpbGVfcGljLnd3dy4xMDgwLkMzIn0\\u00253D&_nc_ohc=S4VxwqFpPecQ7kNvwH0f0Z2&_nc_oc=AdpkMau58O8CsT9-hEOwDJLZ9T8DiuRhvXS0fluSsKoTHzYkm5b91zYdV4vOmke7wF4&_nc_zt=24&_nc_ht=scontent.cdninstagram.com&_nc_gid=FCWsJ6AAeIo1DQuEw3wE3g&_nc_ss=7b60f&oh=00_AQD17Gs81-HVOERC_EMA0mVZqx7kCtUOxKevMGNtPp4xOw&oe=6A666085\",\"username\":\"nainadiary.jpg\",\"followed_by_viewer\":false,\"has_public_story\":true,\"is_private\":false,\"is_unpublished\":false,\"is_verified\":false,\"edge_followed_by\":{\"count\":561},\"edge_owner_to_timeline_media\":{\"count\":138},\"edge_owner_to_timeline_video_media\":{\"count\":0}},\"like_and_view_counts_disabled\":false,\"is_affiliate\":false,\"is_paid_partnership\":false,\"coauthor_producers\":[],\"media_preview\":\"\\u0000\\u0018*????6\\b\\u0015m?&??\\u000e?P?d9???\\u0015D?Db?y\\u0013?j??5gN?s??*?\\u05a4L=9??\\b\\u001f?\\u0014??\\u001bB\\u0011??T'\\u001b$?\\u0018?????j??\\t?\\u0000?\\b?$u\\u0003?z???Z?\\u000f?QAW???\",\"location\":{\"id\":\"285407773\",\"name\":\"Finlande\",\"slug\":\"finlande\"},\"edge_media_to_sponsor_user\":{\"edges\":[]},\"sharing_friction_info\":{\"should_have_sharing_friction\":false,\"bloks_app_url\":null},\"pinned_for_users\":[],\"media_overlay_info\":null}},{\"shortcode_media\":{\"__typename\":\"GraphVideo\",\"id\":\"3941060666755005032\",\"shortcode\":\"Daxdcu4Mjpo\",\"is_video\":true,\"dimensions\":{\"height\":1280,\"width\":720},\"display_url\":\"https:\\\/\\\/scontent.cdninstagram.com\\\/v\\\/t51.82787-15\\\/748150444_18083231624419608_4993677519547061477_n.jpg?stp=dst-jpg_e35_p1080x1080_sh2.08_tt6&_nc_cat=104&ig_cache_key=Mzk
